header.focusBody: Keep the session narrow and repeatable.
header.signedInBody: Protected progress and admin routes stay separated by role.
header.anonymousBody: You can browse lessons and study without saved progress.
header.mobileDescription: Navigate lessons, review pages, and admin tools.

home.title: Learn Chinese at your own pace
home.description: Lessons, vocabulary, grammar, and focused practice in one calm workspace.

lessons.title: Structured lessons
lessons.description: Move through curated lesson paths with vocabulary and grammar together.

dashboard.title: Progress dashboard
dashboard.description: Track review status, lesson completion, and what to study next.

review.title: Review queue
review.description: Clear due words with a lightweight focused session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust language, theme, and study preferences over time.

admin.title: Admin workspace
admin.description: Manage curriculum content with draft and publish controls.

lessonDetail.title: Lesson detail
lessonDetail.description: Review vocabulary and grammar before starting the focused study flow.

studySession.title: Study session
studySession.description: A high-focus learning surface for flashcards, multiple choice, and typing.

home.title: A calmer way to build Chinese vocabulary, grammar, and daily consistency
home.description: Browse public lessons, start practicing immediately, and unlock saved progress when you are ready. The experience stays focused, readable, and structured around one clear next step.

stats.modesDescription: Flashcard, multiple choice, and typing practice in one platform.
stats.structureDescription: Each lesson blends vocabulary and pattern recognition instead of isolating them.
stats.toneDescription: Quiet surfaces, sharp hierarchy, and a dark study panel for practice sessions.

studyPath.title: Move from browsing to deliberate practice without friction
studyPath.description: Public pages help learners explore lessons, vocabulary, and grammar before signing in. Protected pages add saved progress, settings, and admin content management without changing the mental model of the app.
studyPath.browseBody: Open lessons, words, and grammar by level or topic.
studyPath.practiceBody: Switch modes without losing the context of the lesson.
studyPath.reviewBody: Save progress later when you are ready to track it.

focusPanel.title: Designed for concentration, not clutter
focusPanel.description: Practice surfaces keep the prompt central, controls large, and supporting information secondary so the learner can stay inside the exercise.

lessons.title: Follow a structured lesson path
lessons.description: Lessons combine published vocabulary and grammar into one clear entry point before learners move into the focused study shell.
lessons.emptyTitle: No published lessons match these filters
lessons.emptyDescription: Try another topic or HSK level to widen the published lesson list.
lessons.reviewContentFirst: Review the lesson content here first, then move into the learner shell when ready.
lessons.noLessonWordsDescription: This lesson is published, but its public vocabulary composition is still empty.
lessons.noLessonGrammarDescription: This lesson is published, but its public grammar composition is still empty.

vocabulary.title: Words designed for quick recognition and clean reading
vocabulary.description: Browse published vocabulary with clear Hanzi, pinyin, Hán Việt, and meaning, then jump into the learner shell when you are ready.
vocabulary.emptyTitle: No published words match these filters
vocabulary.emptyDescription: Try a different HSK level, topic, or radical filter to widen the results.
vocabulary.noExamples: No public examples have been published for this word yet.

grammar.title: Grammar patterns explained with clear structure
grammar.description: Browse published structure patterns, explanations, and examples before entering focused lesson practice.
grammar.emptyTitle: No published grammar points match these filters
grammar.emptyDescription: Try a different HSK level or reset the filter to browse all public grammar content.
grammar.noExamples: No public examples have been published for this grammar point yet.

auth.title: Save progress without losing the public-first browsing flow
auth.description: Continue with Google to create or refresh your learner profile, unlock protected pages like Dashboard and Settings, and keep future review progress synced.
auth.anonymousVisitors: Anonymous visitors can still browse public lessons and preview the study flow first.

reasons.progress: Prepare for saved review progress in later phases.
reasons.routing: Keep role-based routing consistent for user and admin accounts.

learning.anonymousWarning: Studying works anonymously, but long-term progress is not saved.

studySession.description: Move through the lesson in study order. Switch modes whenever you want without losing your place.
studySession.completeDescription: You finished the lesson study pass. Review the summary below or restart the session.

reviewSession.title: Due words
reviewSession.description: Work through overdue and due-now words with the same study modes you use inside lessons.
reviewSession.completeDescription: You finished the due review items in this session. Return to the dashboard or browse more lessons to keep momentum going.

reviewPage.title: Due review queue
reviewPage.description: Clear the words that are due now or overdue, then return to lessons for fresh material.
reviewPage.emptyDescription: Your saved queue is clear. Continue a lesson to create more review items, or browse published lessons for something new.
reviewPage.suggestedDescription: Keep building the queue with published content.

emptyLesson.title: This lesson has no study words yet
emptyLesson.description: Return to the lesson overview and attach published vocabulary before starting a learner session.

emptyReview.title: Nothing is due right now
emptyReview.description: Your review queue is empty. Continue a lesson or browse the lesson library to add more study material.

dashboard.title: Your study progress
dashboard.description: See what is due now, how your lesson path is moving, and where to focus next.
dashboard.noLessonProgressDescription: Start a lesson to unlock completion tracking, recent study history, and review recommendations.
dashboard.reviewReadinessDescription: What needs attention before the day ends.
dashboard.dailyActivityDescription: Small momentum signals from recent review work.
dashboard.recentReviewDescription: Latest saved answers from your study sessions.
dashboard.noReviewActivityDescription: Review events will appear here after you finish a lesson or clear items from the review queue.

settings.title: Preferences and reading comfort
settings.description: Adjust language, theme, and reading style, then keep those preferences across your study and review surfaces.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the app language used across navigation, learning surfaces, and settings.
settings.languageHelp: Language updates immediately, preserves the current page, and is saved to your profile when signed in.
settings.languageSaveError: Language preference could not be saved.
settings.themeDescription: Choose a stable theme or follow the system appearance automatically.
settings.themeHelp: Theme updates apply immediately after save and stay consistent across dashboard, review, and study pages.
settings.fontDescription: Pick a reading style tuned for Chinese text, pinyin, and translated glosses.
settings.fontHelp: Sans keeps the interface crisp; serif adds extra reading contrast for longer vocabulary and grammar sessions.
settings.liveSummaryDescription: What will be applied right now.
settings.previewDescription: This preview is intentionally small, but the preference applies across the main reading and study surfaces.

errors.dashboardTitle: Dashboard data could not be loaded
errors.dashboardDescription: There was a problem reading your saved progress and review stats.
errors.lessonsDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published lesson content.
errors.vocabularyDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published vocabulary content.
errors.grammarTitle: Grammar content could not be loaded
errors.grammarDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published grammar content.
errors.reviewTitle: Review queue could not be loaded
errors.reviewDescription: There was a problem reading the due review items for your account.
errors.settingsDescription: There was a problem reading or preparing your saved preferences.
errors.learnLessonTitle: The lesson session could not be loaded
errors.learnLessonDescription: A problem occurred while preparing the learner study experience.
errors.adminImportDescription: The import tools could not be loaded. Try again or return to the admin vocabulary library.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The address may be outdated, unpublished, or mistyped. Return to the lesson library or head back to the main workspace.
notFound.emptyDescription: Try a published lesson, dashboard, or home page instead.

learn.description: Study lesson vocabulary with flashcards, multiple choice, and typing. Signed-in learners save progress, while anonymous learners can practice without persistence.
learn.notReadyTitle: This lesson is not ready for study
learn.notReadyDescription: Attach published words to the lesson before starting a learner session.

overview.title: Content management
overview.description: Manage curriculum content, taxonomy, and lesson composition inside the protected workspace.

sections.wordsDescription: Manage vocabulary, examples, publish state, and taxonomy links.
sections.grammarDescription: Create grammar explanations, examples, and publishable lesson content.
sections.lessonsDescription: Compose ordered lesson content from words and grammar points.
sections.topicsDescription: Maintain lesson categories and content organization.
sections.radicalsDescription: Maintain Chinese radical reference data for vocabulary entries.

words.title: Vocabulary
words.description: Create, edit, publish, and organize vocabulary entries with attached examples.
words.emptyDescription: Create the first vocabulary entry to start building the library.

form.title: Word details
form.description: Use one example per line in the format: Chinese | Pinyin | Vietnamese meaning

create.title: New word
create.description: Create a vocabulary entry with optional taxonomy links and attached examples.

edit.description: Update vocabulary details, publish state, and examples.

grammar.title: Grammar points
grammar.description: Manage explanations, publish state, and example sentences for grammar content.
grammar.emptyDescription: Add the first grammar entry to start structuring lessons.

form.title: Grammar point details
form.description: Use one example per line in the format: Chinese | Pinyin | Vietnamese meaning

create.title: New grammar point
create.description: Create a grammar explanation with examples and publish controls.

edit.description: Update grammar explanations, examples, and publish state.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Manage publishable lessons and compose ordered words and grammar points.
lessons.emptyDescription: Create a lesson to start attaching ordered vocabulary and grammar points.

create.title: New lesson
create.description: Create a lesson and attach ordered words and grammar points.

edit.description: Update lesson metadata, publish state, and ordered composition.

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: Manage content categories used by words and lessons.
topics.emptyDescription: Create a topic to organize words and lessons by theme.

radicals.title: Radicals
radicals.description: Manage radical reference data used by vocabulary entries.
radicals.emptyDescription: Create radicals to support richer vocabulary metadata.

import.title: Import words from CSV or JSON
import.description: Upload a validated import file to create vocabulary entries in bulk. Invalid or duplicate rows are skipped with row-level reporting.
import.uploadDescription: Required fields: slug, simplified, hanzi, pinyin, vietnamese_meaning, hsk_level.
import.examplesDescription: JSON imports can provide an examples array. CSV imports can use an examples_json column containing a JSON array of example objects.
import.templatesDescription: Use the bundled templates to avoid formatting mistakes.
import.latestResultDescription: Import summary and row-level validation feedback.
import.noImportYet: No import has been run yet in this session.
